op.EMBER.potential.1.event.description.text: Talent Inflamed for the Assault improved: Protection effect +20%; hitting an enemy extends the duration by 1.5s.

op.EMBER.potential.3.event.description.text: Combo skill Frontline Support improved: Restores the HP of another teammate with the lowest percentage HP at 50% of the base effect.

op.EMBER.potential.4.event.description.text: Ultimate Re-Ignited Oath improved: Ultimate Energy cost -15%.

op.EMBER.potential.5.event.description.text: Ultimate Re-Ignited Oath improved: Shield effect is multiplied by 1.2; while this shield is active, the wielder gains ATK +10%.

op.EMBER.skill.FORWARD_MARCH.event.descr.text: A leap followed by a heavy slam that deals Heat DMG, Knock Down, and Stagger to all enemies in a fan-shaped area.

op.EMBER.skill.FORWARD_MARCH_EMPOWERED.e.text: A leap followed by a heavy slam that deals Heat DMG, Knock Down, and Stagger to all enemies in a fan-shaped area. Ember took DMG from enemies during casting, so the slam deals more Stagger when it hits.

op.EMBER.skill.FRONTLINE_SUPPORT.event.d.text: When the controlled operator is attacked. Leaps at the target enemy and unleashes a heavy slam that deals Physical DMG and Knock Down while giving HP treatment to the controlled operator. The attribute of Will increases the amount of HP treatment.

op.EMBER.skill.RE_IGNITED_OATH.event.des.text: Slams the ground to deal Heat DMG to nearby enemies, while granting every teammate a Shield based on Ember's Max HP.

op.EMBER.skill.SWORD_ART_OF_ASSAULT_BATK.text: An attack with up to 4 sequences that deals Physical DMG. As the controlled operator, Final Strike also deals {poise:0} Stagger.

op.EMBER.skill.SWORD_ART_OF_ASSAULT_DIVE.text: Basic attack performed in mid-air becomes a dive attack that deals Physical DMG to nearby enemies.

op.EMBER.skill.SWORD_ART_OF_ASSAULT_FINI.text: Basic attack performed near a Staggered enemy becomes a finisher that deals massive Physical DMG and recovers some SP.

op.EMBER.status.INFLAMED_FOR_THE_ASSAULT.text: When casting the battle skill Forward March and the combo skill Frontline Support, Ember gains 50% Protection and is less likely to be interrupted.

op.EMBER.status.THE_STEEL_OATH.event.des.text: Grants every teammate a Shield based on 18%-25% of Ember's Max HP for 10s.

op.EMBER.status.THE_STEEL_OATH_EMPOWERED.text: Ultimate Re-Ignited Oath improved: Shield effect is multiplied by 1.2; while this shield is active, the wielder gains ATK +10%.

op.EMBER.talent.INFLAMED_FOR_THE_ASSAULT.text: When casting the battle skill Forward March and the combo skill Frontline Support, Ember gains 50% Protection and is less likely to be interrupted.

op.EMBER.talent.PAY_THE_FERRIC_PRICE.eve.text: When Ember receives DMG from the enemy, she gains ATK +{attack:0%} for {duration:0}s. This effect can reach 3 stacks.
